comments.comment: Increased refuse processed in 2020 compared to 2019 resulted in more ash byproduct which increased cadmium amount

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Longer boiler operations, more refuse processed and increased emission rate (relative to previous year's rate) reported during source testing resulted in higher reported lead value

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Previously was using stack flow on CEMS to calculate boiler emission. This year used isokinetic velocity calculated during stack testing to calculate emission rates instead of stack flow as analyser was not RATA in 2021. Continued to use the analysers that were RATA (CO/SO2/NOx/THC) in emission calculation. 

Combustion of variable fuel (MSW) results in annual variation in releases.
